summary: Iteration 42 - License Fixes Verification Complete. All 13 tests passed. Verified: 1) Honorary licensee creation accepts $0 starting amount (frontend hides input, backend accepts), 2) Extended licensee creation requires starting amount (frontend validates), 3) Login returns 403 with specific message when license is revoked/inactive (lines 645-657), 4) Extended licensee lot_size is FIXED per quarter (verified with actual data - 6 quarters all show fixed values), 5) Extended licensee daily_profit is FIXED per quarter, 6) LicenseeAccountPage uses profitAPI.getSummary for balance synchronization (lines 84-99), 7) License projections include lot_size field from backend (line 3001).
critical_code_review_comments: Honorary licensee starting amount: Frontend hides input for honorary (line 931 AdminLicensesPage.jsx), handleCreateInvite sets starting_amount to 0 for honorary (line 123)
Extended licensee starting amount: Frontend validates positive amount required (lines 112-114 AdminLicensesPage.jsx)
Login license revocation check (lines 645-657 server.py): Correctly checks for active license when user has license_type, returns 403 with message 'Your license has been revoked or expired'
Extended licensee lot_size FIXED per quarter: calculate_extended_license_projections (lines 2964-3010) calculates quarter_lot_size once per quarter (lines 2976, 2989)
Extended licensee daily_profit FIXED per quarter: quarter_daily_profit calculated once per quarter (lines 2977, 2990)
LicenseeAccountPage synchronization: Uses profitAPI.getSummary (lines 84-87) to get account_value, ensuring sync with Dashboard and Profit Tracker
License projections include lot_size: Returned at line 3001 in calculate_extended_license_projections

success_rate.frontend: N/A (backend only testing - frontend code review verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 user-reported issues have been verified as fixed: 1) Honorary members cannot set starting value (input hidden, defaults to $0), 2) Dashboard/Profit Tracker/Deposit-Withdrawal pages synchronized via profitAPI.getSummary, 3) Licensees with revoked license get 403 on login with specific message, 4) Extended licensee lot_size is FIXED per quarter (not growing daily). Extended license projections verified with actual data showing 6 quarters all with fixed lot_size and daily_profit values.

honorary_licensee_zero_starting_amount.details: Frontend hides starting amount input for honorary (line 931), handleCreateInvite sets to 0 (line 123). Backend accepts $0.

extended_licensee_requires_starting_amou.details: Frontend validates positive starting amount required for extended (lines 112-114). Backend accepts any value.

login_403_for_revoked_license.details: Login checks for active license when user has license_type (lines 645-657). Returns 403 with message: 'Your license has been revoked or expired. Please contact the administrator to renew your license.'

extended_licensee_fixed_lot_size_per_qua.details: Verified with actual data: Q1 2026 lot_size=2.66 (55 days), Q2 2026 lot_size=4.9 (62 days), Q3 2026 lot_size=9.55 (65 days), Q4 2026 lot_size=19.05 (64 days), Q1 2027 lot_size=37.72 (63 days), Q2 2027 lot_size=74.09 (56 days). All quarters show FIXED lot_size.

extended_licensee_fixed_daily_profit_per.details: Verified with actual data: Q1 2026 daily_profit=$39.9, Q2 2026 daily_profit=$73.5, Q3 2026 daily_profit=$143.25, Q4 2026 daily_profit=$285.75, Q1 2027 daily_profit=$565.8, Q2 2027 daily_profit=$1111.35. All quarters show FIXED daily_profit.

licensee_account_page_synchronization.details: LicenseeAccountPage.jsx uses profitAPI.getSummary (lines 84-87) to get account_value, ensuring synchronization with Dashboard and Profit Tracker.

license_projections_include_lot_size.details: calculate_extended_license_projections returns lot_size field (line 3001). Verified via API response.

api_tests.POST /api/admin/license-invites (honorar: PASS - Creates invite with $0 starting amount
api_tests.POST /api/admin/license-invites (extende: PASS - Creates invite with valid amount
api_tests.GET /api/admin/licenses: PASS - Returns all licenses with projections
api_tests.GET /api/admin/licenses/{id}: PASS - Returns license details with projections including lot_size

honorary_starting_amount_hidden.notes: Starting amount input only shown when license_type === 'extended'

login_license_revocation_check.notes: Checks for active license when is_licensee, returns 403 with specific message

calculate_extended_license_projections.notes: quarter_lot_size and quarter_daily_profit calculated once per quarter, used for all trading days in quarter

licensee_account_page_sync.notes: Uses profitAPI.getSummary for account_value, ensuring sync with other pages

profit_tracker_backend_projections.notes: Uses licenseProjections from backend with fixed lot_size and daily_profit per quarter
